Results.AirlineRemark: If you are traveling in flights G9 with Four Digit Flight number to and from Jeddah/Sharjah then you will need Umrah visa to board flight. Only ICA/GDFRA approved residents permit holders can travel on these special flights to Dubai. COVID negative certificates from the authorised lab by the government of India and UAE is a mandate. More information will follow through Air Arabia Website. .
